title: Javajawas
content:
{{Top|rwp|sortkey=*Javajawas}}
'''javajawas''' was the alias of the author who wrote the backstory of [[Pax Bonkik]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

Her alias is ''Barriss_Coffee'' on [[TheForce.net]].

{{Bio-stub}}
